entry.title: Bugatti La Voiture Noire: Things To Know About The World’s Most Expensive Car

link.title: Bugatti La Voiture Noire: Things To Know About The World’s Most Expensive Car

entry.content:
Cristiano Ronaldo added yet another luxurious car to his collection of cars. The Portuguese superstar celebrated Juventus’ ninth successive Serie A 2019-20 title win by purchasing the world most expensive car Bugatti La Voiture Noire. Take a look at some facts about the grans ‘Black Car.’
#BugattiLaVoitureNoire #CritianoRonaldo
Link:
Subscribe:
Facebook:
Twitter:
Instagram:
entry.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo added yet another luxurious car to his collection of cars. The Portuguese superstar celebrated Juventus’ ninth successive Serie A 2019-20 title win by purchasing the world most expensive car Bugatti La Voiture Noire. Take a look at some facts about the grans ‘Black Car.’ #BugattiLaVoitureNoire #CritianoRonaldo Link: Subscribe: Facebook: Twitter: Instagram:

entry.title: Trump competes with other nations on COVID-19 response

link.title: Trump competes with other nations on COVID-19 response

entry.content:
"We’re lower than the world."
— Donald Trump on the COVID-19 death toll in an interview with Axios.
The president seems to regularly compare the U.S. to other countries badly hit by the coronavirus.
entry.summary: "We’re lower than the world." — Donald Trump on the COVID-19 death toll in an interview with Axios. The president seems to regularly compare the U.S. to other countries badly hit by the coronavirus.

entry.title: Hishammuddin caught vaping during parliamentary proceedings, apologises on social media

link.title: Hishammuddin caught vaping during parliamentary proceedings, apologises on social media

entry.content:
A video depicting Foreign Affairs Minister Datuk Seri Hishammuddin Hussein vaping during parliamentary proceedings on Monday is making its rounds on social media.
Hishammuddin, however, apologised on Twitter and promised not to vape in the compounds of the Parliament building again.
Read more at
WATCH MORE:
SUBSCRIBE:
LIKE:
entry.summary: A video depicting Foreign Affairs Minister Datuk Seri Hishammuddin Hussein vaping during parliamentary proceedings on Monday is making its rounds on social media. Hishammuddin, however, apologised on Twitter and promised not to vape in the compounds of the Parliament building again. Read more at WATCH MORE: SUBSCRIBE: LIKE:

entry.title: Qurbatain Episode 11 Promo HUM TV Drama

link.title: Qurbatain Episode 11 Promo HUM TV Drama

entry.content:
Qurbatain, Episode 11 Promo, Official HD Video - 10 August 2020
Qurbatain is HUM TV’s newest presentation that revolves around friendship, lust and deceit. It is an intertwined story of two friends Areeba and Zamal and highlights how low one can stoop to gain a luxurious life but at what cost. Areeba, raised by a single mother belongs to a low-middle class family while Zamal belongs to an upper-class family. Lured by wealth and luxurious life, Areeba takes some dreadful steps that put an irreparable dent on the sacred bond of friendship and her morality, but little does she know what fate has in store for her.
Starring:
Anmol Baloch, Shehbaz Hamid Shigri, Komal Sajid, Arij Moheuddin, Kashif Mahmood, Munazzah Arif, Tahira Imam, Abbas Ashraf Awan, Laiba Sarfaraz, Leyla Zuberi, Ahmed Taha Ghani, Kamran Hussain, Halima, Zain Afzal and others.
Directed By: Kamran Akbar Khan
Written By: Rizwan Ahmed
Produced By: Momina Duraid Productions
#Qurbatain #HUMTV #AnmolBaloch #ShehbazHamidShigri #KomalSajid #ArijMoheuddin
entry.summary: Qurbatain, Episode 11 Promo, Official HD Video - 10 August 2020 Qurbatain is HUM TV’s newest presentation that revolves around friendship, lust and deceit. It is an intertwined story of two friends Areeba and Zamal and highlights how low one can stoop to gain a luxurious life but at what cost. Areeba, raised by a single mother belongs to a low-middle class family while Zamal belongs to an upper-class family. Lured by wealth and luxurious life, Areeba takes some dreadful steps that put an irreparable dent on the sacred bond of friendship and her morality, but little does she know what fate has in store for her. Starring: Anmol Baloch, Shehbaz Hamid Shigri, Komal Sajid, Arij Moheuddin, Kashif Mahmood, Munazzah Arif, Tahira Imam, Abbas Ashraf Awan, Laiba Sarfaraz, Leyla Zuberi, Ahmed Taha Ghani, Kamran Hussain, Halima, Zain Afzal and others. Directed By: Kamran Akbar Khan Written By: Rizwan Ahmed Produced By: Momina Duraid Productions #Qurbatain #HUMTV #AnmolBaloch #ShehbazHamidShigri #KomalSajid #ArijMoheuddin

entry.title: Karan Wahi Talks About Craziest Things He Has Done In His Life

link.title: Karan Wahi Talks About Craziest Things He Has Done In His Life

entry.content: Dil Mil Aaye actor Karan Wahi does not consider himself an adventurous person, though he does not mind trying out adventure activity. In an with a news portal, the actor recollected his experience of skydiving in Dubai. “I went to Dubai a few years ago and jumped off the plane. Nothing can be scarier. It was one of the craziest things I have done in life. It’s stupid. We were given a demo and a half-hour training schedule of what to do if a panic situation happens.” The Remix star has a dream to get clicked in front of the Seven Wonders of the World. On the work front, Karan is currently seen exploring his adventurous side on the Rohit Shetty’s Khatron Ke Khiladi: Made In India.
entry.summary: Dil Mil Aaye actor Karan Wahi does not consider himself an adventurous person, though he does not mind trying out adventure activity. In an with a news portal, the actor recollected his experience of skydiving in Dubai. “I went to Dubai a few years ago and jumped off the plane. Nothing can be scarier. It was one of the craziest things I have done in life. It’s stupid. We were given a demo and a half-hour training schedule of what to do if a panic situation happens.” The Remix star has a dream to get clicked in front of the Seven Wonders of the World. On the work front, Karan is currently seen exploring his adventurous side on the Rohit Shetty’s Khatron Ke Khiladi: Made In India.

entry.title: Le temps des vacances : la montagne, une destination plébiscitée par les Français

link.title: Le temps des vacances : la montagne, une destination plébiscitée par les Français

entry.content:
La montagne reste idéale pour les amoureux de la nature. Même si la neige a disparu des sommets l’été, elle demeure un terrain de jeu exceptionnel pour les amateurs de sport et de randonnée. Retour en archives sur l’essor du tourisme estival dans les montagnes.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: La montagne reste idéale pour les amoureux de la nature. Même si la neige a disparu des sommets l’été, elle demeure un terrain de jeu exceptionnel pour les amateurs de sport et de randonnée. Retour en archives sur l’essor du tourisme estival dans les montagnes. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Des clips de Hip-Hop aux défilés haute-couture, une exposition à Bordeaux met à l’honneur les sneakers

link.title: Des clips de Hip-Hop aux défilés haute-couture, une exposition à Bordeaux met à l’honneur les sneakers

entry.content:
Les baskets représentent la moitié des ventes de chaussures en France. Plus qu’une mode, c’est un objet culte qui attire la convoitise des grands collectionneurs. Elles s’exposent au musée des Arts décoratifs et du Design de Bordeaux jusqu’en 2021.  
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Les baskets représentent la moitié des ventes de chaussures en France. Plus qu’une mode, c’est un objet culte qui attire la convoitise des grands collectionneurs. Elles s’exposent au musée des Arts décoratifs et du Design de Bordeaux jusqu’en 2021. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: El viaje de Sparrow, la tortuga boba que cruzó el Mediterráneo

link.title: El viaje de Sparrow, la tortuga boba que cruzó el Mediterráneo

entry.content: Sparrow, la tortuga boba que cruzó el Mediterráneo tras surcar Almería, Murcia, Baleares y Cerdeña fue localizada en la playa de La Victoria, en Cádiz, por un particular.
entry.summary: Sparrow, la tortuga boba que cruzó el Mediterráneo tras surcar Almería, Murcia, Baleares y Cerdeña fue localizada en la playa de La Victoria, en Cádiz, por un particular.

entry.title: Brayden Point registers game-winner in 5OT for Lightning

link.title: Brayden Point registers game-winner in 5OT for Lightning

entry.content: Brayden Point scoops a rebound and buries it home, giving the Lightning a 3-2 win in the fifth overtime period and the second-longest game of the NHL’s modern era
entry.summary: Brayden Point scoops a rebound and buries it home, giving the Lightning a 3-2 win in the fifth overtime period and the second-longest game of the NHL’s modern era

entry.title: Princesse Charlotte : le mariage manqué de son parrain et sa maîtresse d’école

link.title: Princesse Charlotte : le mariage manqué de son parrain et sa maîtresse d’école

entry.content:
Princesse Charlotte : le mariage manqué
de son parrain et sa maîtresse d’école.
La prochaine rentrée scolaire de la princesse Charlotte ne ressemblera pas aux autres.
L’un de ses parrains, Thomas van Straubenzee
a épousé le 24 juillet dernier Lucy Lanigan-O’Keeffe.
La jeune femme enseigne à l’école Thomas’s Battersea
où sont scolarisés les enfants Cambridge.
Une anecdote amusante, et un mariage étonnant,
où la fille de Kate Middleton et du prince William 
devait tenir le rôle de demoiselle d’honneur.
Prévu pour avril dernier, le mariage s’est finalement tenu
au cours de l’été à cause de la pandémie de coronavirus. .
Malheureusement, la famille royale n’a pas pu y assister.
La princesse Charlotte ne pourra donc pas
se vanter d’avoir été demoiselle d’honneur
au mariage de son parrain et de sa maîtresse. .
Elle pourra néanmoins dire plus tard qu’elle a rencontré
le premier enfant du couple, puisque 
Lucy Lanigan-O’Keeffe est enceinte.
Une union qui aurait été encouragée par 
le prince William et Kate Middleton,
à l’origine de la rencontre du couple
entry.summary: Princesse Charlotte : le mariage manqué de son parrain et sa maîtresse d’école. La prochaine rentrée scolaire de la princesse Charlotte ne ressemblera pas aux autres. L’un de ses parrains, Thomas van Straubenzee a épousé le 24 juillet dernier Lucy Lanigan-O’Keeffe. La jeune femme enseigne à l’école Thomas’s Battersea où sont scolarisés les enfants Cambridge. Une anecdote amusante, et un mariage étonnant, où la fille de Kate Middleton et du prince William devait tenir le rôle de demoiselle d’honneur. Prévu pour avril dernier, le mariage s’est finalement tenu au cours de l’été à cause de la pandémie de coronavirus. . Malheureusement, la famille royale n’a pas pu y assister. La princesse Charlotte ne pourra donc pas se vanter d’avoir été demoiselle d’honneur au mariage de son parrain et de sa maîtresse. . Elle pourra néanmoins dire plus tard qu’elle a rencontré le premier enfant du couple, puisque Lucy Lanigan-O’Keeffe est enceinte. Une union qui aurait été encouragée par le prince William et Kate Middleton, à l’origine de la rencontre du couple

entry.title: Coronavirus : comment éviter un reconfinement ?

link.title: Coronavirus : comment éviter un reconfinement ?

entry.content:
Face à une épidémie de coronavirus qui pourrait de nouveau circuler de façon intense en France, les professionnels de santé appellent la population à tout faire pour ne pas avoir à se confiner de nouveau.

entry.title: ANITTA E LARY BOTTINO: AMIGAS RESPONDEM ÀS CRÍTICAS DE SEGUIDORES DEPOIS DE ACUSAÇÕES!

link.title: ANITTA E LARY BOTTINO: AMIGAS RESPONDEM ÀS CRÍTICAS DE SEGUIDORES DEPOIS DE ACUSAÇÕES!

entry.content:
Parece que muita gente não tá gostando da amizade de #LaryBottino e #Anitta. Depois de receberem muitas críticas, Lary decidiu falar um pouco mais sobre a amizade e garantiu que não precisa ser bancada por sua amiga. Confira toda essa polêmica!
#AnittaDentroDaCasinha

entry.title: Actor Sanjay Dutt Diagnosed With Stage 3 Lung Cancer Oneindia Telugu

link.title: Actor Sanjay Dutt Diagnosed With Stage 3 Lung Cancer Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
Sanjay Dutt Diagnosed With Stage 3 Lung Cancer: Devastated Actor Needs Instant And Rigorous Treatment, Leaves For US
#Sanjaydutt
#Manyatadutt
#Bollywood
#Sadak2
#Lungcancer
#Mumbai
#Kgf2
మరో వైపు ప్రతిష్టాత్మక కెజిఎఫ్ 2లో సంజయ్ దత్ ప్రధాన విలన్ అధీరా పాత్ర చేస్తున్నారు. ఇంకా కొంత భాగం షూటింగ్ మిగిలి ఉండగా, సంజయ్ పై కొన్ని కీలక సన్నివేశాల చిత్రీకరణ మిగిలివుంది.
entry.summary: Sanjay Dutt Diagnosed With Stage 3 Lung Cancer: Devastated Actor Needs Instant And Rigorous Treatment, Leaves For US #Sanjaydutt #Manyatadutt #Bollywood #Sadak2 #Lungcancer #Mumbai #Kgf2 మరో వైపు ప్రతిష్టాత్మక కెజిఎఫ్ 2లో సంజయ్ దత్ ప్రధాన విలన్ అధీరా పాత్ర చేస్తున్నారు. ఇంకా కొంత భాగం షూటింగ్ మిగిలి ఉండగా, సంజయ్ పై కొన్ని కీలక సన్నివేశాల చిత్రీకరణ మిగిలివుంది.

entry.title: ‘Painful experience with DAP led to Bersatu’s exit’

link.title: ‘Painful experience with DAP led to Bersatu’s exit’

entry.content:
When Muhyiddin Yassin decided to withdraw Bersatu from the Pakatan Harapan coalition, its members and leaders were left in a conundrum.
They were torn between their president, Muhyiddin, and chairperson, Dr Mahathir Mohamad. The latter chose to remain with his Harapan allies.
Most, including Youth wing member Wan Ahmad Fayshal Wan Ahmad Kamal, went with Muhyiddin, leaving Mahathir with a handful of loyalists.
Speaking to Malaysiakini and Bicara Minggu Ini in an interview, Fayhsal explained the reasons for leaving Harapan although the then Youth chief Syed Saddiq Abdul Rahman chose to be with Mahathir.
entry.summary: When Muhyiddin Yassin decided to withdraw Bersatu from the Pakatan Harapan coalition, its members and leaders were left in a conundrum. They were torn between their president, Muhyiddin, and chairperson, Dr Mahathir Mohamad. The latter chose to remain with his Harapan allies. Most, including Youth wing member Wan Ahmad Fayshal Wan Ahmad Kamal, went with Muhyiddin, leaving Mahathir with a handful of loyalists. Speaking to Malaysiakini and Bicara Minggu Ini in an interview, Fayhsal explained the reasons for leaving Harapan although the then Youth chief Syed Saddiq Abdul Rahman chose to be with Mahathir.

entry.title: In Your Bad Day (Part I) - Daynim RockOn LIVE Session

entry.content:

ทั้งเสียงร้องนุ่ม ๆ และการผสมผสานซาวด์ดนตรีที่น่าสนใจ

และเว็บไซต์ RockOnRadio.FM

entry.title: [S8 E3] Wentworth Season 8 Episode 3 : English Subtitles

link.title: [S8 E3] Wentworth Season 8 Episode 3 : English Subtitles

entry.content:
Wentworth Season 8 Episode 3 : Enemy Of The State
[[ ]]
Storyline :
Bea Smith is locked up while awaiting trial for the attempted murder of her husband and must learn how life works in prison. A modern adaptation and sequel of the iconic Prisoner series.
Genre: Drama, Crime
Network : showcase
entry.summary: Wentworth Season 8 Episode 3 : Enemy Of The State [[ ]] Storyline : Bea Smith is locked up while awaiting trial for the attempted murder of her husband and must learn how life works in prison. A modern adaptation and sequel of the iconic Prisoner series. Genre: Drama, Crime Network : showcase
